title: Webhook data received in binary format
symptom: When receiving data from GLPI via webhook, the data arrives in binary format instead of JSON, causing issues in processing.
not_this_if: Data is already in JSON format
Using a different source for webhooks
root_cause: The GLPI webhook may be configured to send data in a binary format rather than JSON. This can happen if the Content-Type header is not set correctly in the webhook configuration.
fix_steps: Access the webhook configuration in GLPI
Add or modify the header to include 'Content-Type: application/json'
Save the changes and test the webhook again
agent_instruction: Ensure the GLPI webhook sends data with 'Content-Type: application/json'.
